steps.title: Use starting height and rate
steps.content: The cable car starts $17$ feet above the ground and rises $9$ feet each second. After $s$ seconds, the total rise is $9s$.

steps.title: Write the height equation
steps.content:
Add the starting height and the rise after $s$ seconds.
$$h=17+9s$$
$$h=9s+17$$
The answer is A.
